per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REG-086 requires providing a copy of personal data, while the REA specifies one way data portability requests will be fulfilled. The texts are related but do not clearly state the same constraint, so no quote-supported mismatch is established.

REG-087 concerns charging a reasonable fee for further copies, while the REA concerns mailing printed data for portability requests. They do not clearly express the same constraint or a direct conflict.

REG-068 requires informing the data subject about the existence of the right to data portability, while the REA states how portability requests will be fulfilled. These address different obligations, so no direct mismatch is quote-supported.
